title: Rhos Blaen Carrog
summary: Rhos Blaen Carrog is a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Ceredigion,  west Wales, due to its population of Wavy St. John's Wort (Hypericum undulatum), an extremely rare variety of St. John's Wort.
text: Rhos Blaen Carrog is a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Ceredigion,  west Wales, due to its population of Wavy St. John's Wort (Hypericum undulatum), an extremely rare variety of St. John's Wort.
